name: timeline-pulse
description: MCP server + public atlas of timeline-shift folklore, Mandela Effect reports, and collider-era myth — every claim labeled, every source graded. A cultural archive, not a proof engine.
data_license: Original summaries and metadata; official facts link to their institutional sources. See docs/SOURCE_POLICY.md.

tools.name: timeline_search_reports
tools.description: Search reports by text, motif, phenomenon, source type, date, stance, or evidence grade.

tools.name: timeline_get_report
tools.description: One full report: claims, anchors, motifs, related reports, safety labels, phrasing guide.

tools.name: timeline_mandela_catalog
tools.description: Memory variants with community and mainstream notes side by side.

tools.name: timeline_motif_map
tools.description: Motif nodes and weighted co-occurrence edges — the constellation as JSON.

tools.name: timeline_story_threads
tools.description: Curated arcs in belief / neutral / skeptical frames.

tools.name: timeline_events
tools.description: Official science and community-symbolic timeline layers, never blended.

tools.name: timeline_compare_sources
tools.description: Three framings of one topic plus officially-sourced shared facts.

tools.name: timeline_deepen_story
tools.description: Research prompts and follow-up angles — never fabricated sources.

tools.name: timeline_agent_manifest
tools.description: Corpus rules, safe language, citation policy, first calls.

positioning: Documents how timeline-shift stories are told. Does not claim they are physically true.
